notes: Round-3 labeling.py ablation #4: same Platt consumption as sub33_label_platt, paired with an UNCERTAINTY-based acquisition_function (score = -|p_sub33 - 0.5|). Within each category the platform reveals the 5 items where sub 33 is least confident. Hypothesis: uncertainty acquisition concentrates the K=25 label budget where the Platt Hessian is densest; if Platt + random is a no-op but Platt + uncertainty recovers NLL, the bottleneck was acquisition not consumption.
